explanation: This LTL formula captures the requirement that the autopilot will eventually transition from the "TRANSITION" state to the "NOMINAL" state when both the system is supported and the sensor data is good. It uses the "until" operator (U) to ensure that the autopilot will remain in the "TRANSITION" state until both the "supported" and "good" conditions are met. Once these conditions are met, the autopilot will transition to the "NOMINAL" state, as indicated by the "state_is_NOMINAL" proposition.
